It should not land without a roadmap target and substantial splitting.","findings":[{"file":"","line":0,"issue":"No roadmap target is identified; the PR description instead states the examples are deliberately off-roadmap and expected to be refused.","fix":"Block until a human adds an appropriate roadmap item, or resubmit only material that advances a named roadmap file and node/heading.","evidence":"PR description: \"It is deliberately off-roadmap and expected to be refused; nothing here is intended to land.\""},{"file":"TauCeti/AtlasExamples.lean","line":0,"issue":"The PR bundles three unrelated topics: a curvature gauge transformation theorem, a compact-oriented-manifold class, and uniform boundedness.","fix":"Split into separate PRs, each tied to one roadmap target or one proximate prerequisite.","evidence":"The new file contains `curvature_gauge_transformation` at line 17, `IsCompactOrientedManifold` at line 23, and `uniform_boundedness_principle` at line 36."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: The PR is both explicitly off-roadmap and not a single coherent topic. It should not land without a roadmap target and substantial splitting.

findings.issue: No roadmap target is identified; the PR description instead states the examples are deliberately off-roadmap and expected to be refused.
findings.fix: Block until a human adds an appropriate roadmap item, or resubmit only material that advances a named roadmap file and node/heading.
findings.evidence: PR description: "It is deliberately off-roadmap and expected to be refused; nothing here is intended to land."

findings.issue: The PR bundles three unrelated topics: a curvature gauge transformation theorem, a compact-oriented-manifold class, and uniform boundedness.
findings.fix: Split into separate PRs, each tied to one roadmap target or one proximate prerequisite.
findings.evidence: The new file contains `curvature_gauge_transformation` at line 17, `IsCompactOrientedManifold` at line 23, and `uniform_boundedness_principle` at line 36.
